title: The Affairs of Messalina
writer: Carmine Gallone, Vittorio Nino Novarese, Albert Valentin
actors: María Félix, Georges Marchal, Memo Benassi
plot: A story, set in Rome of 44 A.D., concerning the amorous and political intrigues of the evil Empress Messalina, the wife of the Roman Emperor Claudius, and her eventual hounding to death.
